## Safety and privacy checklist

- [ ] No secrets, signing files, credentials or `.env` files added.
- [ ] No real private data added.
- [ ] No networking added unless explicitly allowed by the issue.
- [ ] No persistence added unless explicitly allowed by the issue.
- [ ] No model calls, external providers, CoreML runtime changes or App Intents added unless explicitly allowed by the issue.
- [ ] Approval, privacy and delegation behavior were not loosened.
- [ ] If behavior changed, tests and docs were updated.
